mechanism_narrative: A positive 3-month trend in industrial production signals improving real activity and operating leverage for listed firms, causing higher S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days when the latest INDPRO level exceeds its 3-month prior level.
failure_condition: Reject if positive 3-month INDPRO trends produce 20-day S&P 500 returns no higher than unconditional returns in walk-forward tests, or if Rank IC is below 0.03 over two consecutive 3-year rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp increase in unemployment signals deteriorating household income, weaker credit quality, and recession risk, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days after UNRATE rises materially over a short window.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by more than 0.3 percentage points over 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations have positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases and average triggered returns are not below the unconditional average at p <= 0.10.

mechanism_narrative: Joint acceleration in payroll employment and retail sales signals simultaneous income growth and consumption demand, causing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days only when both labor income and spending proxies improve together.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS 3-month change is positive and RSAFS 3-month change is positive
failure_condition: Reject if the joint positive PAYEMS and RSAFS signal does not outperform either single-series signal by at least 25 basis points in average 20-day return over rolling 3-year walk-forward windows.

mechanism_narrative: When the federal funds rate is pinned near zero, accelerating consumer prices reduce expected real policy support and pressure equity valuation multiples, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS is below 0.25 and CPIAUCSL 6-month annualized growth is above its 12-month growth
failure_condition: Reject if triggered zero-rate inflation-acceleration periods produce average 60-day S&P 500 returns above the unconditional average or if the interaction term is not negative in walk-forward regressions.

mechanism_narrative: A rebound in housing starts from depressed levels signals improving construction activity, household balance-sheet repair, and stronger durable-goods demand, causing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST is below 800 and rises by more than 10 percent over 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if low-level HOUST rebound signals have nonpositive average 60-day S&P 500 returns in walk-forward testing or underperform unconditional 60-day returns in more than half of rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Persistent CPI acceleration signals margin pressure and a higher required nominal discount rate, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days when inflation momentum rises relative to its recent history.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 3-month annualized growth exceeds CPIAUCSL 12-month growth by more than 1 percentage point
failure_condition: Reject if inflation-acceleration triggers are followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 65% of instances and the average triggered return is not below baseline at p <= 0.10.

mechanism_narrative: Rising payrolls combined with a falling unemployment rate signals broad labor-market healing and stronger aggregate income, causing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days through improved near-term risk appetite.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS rises over 3 months and UNRATE falls by at least 0.2 percentage points over 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if the joint payrolls-up and unemployment-down trigger fails to deliver a positive mean 5-day return, or if its hit rate is not above the unconditional 5-day positive-return frequency in rolling tests.

mechanism_narrative: A contraction in retail sales signals weakening final demand and near-term earnings risk for cyclical sectors, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days after retail sales momentum crosses below zero.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS 3-month percent change crosses from positive to negative
failure_condition: Reject if negative RSAFS momentum-crossing signals are followed by positive 5-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of triggered cases or if average triggered returns are not below unconditional returns.
